prompt: Elegant studio fashion portrait of a young woman with a warm, genuine smile, seated comfortably on a richly patterned Persian rug in deep blue and ivory tones against a textured wine-red backdrop. She wears a fitted olive-brown short-sleeve knit top paired with tailored high-waisted plaid trousers in earthy shades. Her hair is styled in a sophisticated braided updo adorned with delicate pearl and crystal accents, complemented by a subtle gold pendant necklace. A vintage tan leather handbag rests beside her, while a ceramic vase filled with red berries and dried branches adds a refined decorative touch. Her bare feet are visible, enhancing the relaxed editorial mood. Soft diffused studio lighting, natural skin tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, photorealistic, high-end editorial photography, ultra-detailed.
promptEn: Elegant studio fashion portrait of a young woman with a warm, genuine smile, seated comfortably on a richly patterned Persian rug in deep blue and ivory tones against a textured wine-red backdrop. She wears a fitted olive-brown short-sleeve knit top paired with tailored high-waisted plaid trousers in earthy shades. Her hair is styled in a sophisticated braided updo adorned with delicate pearl and crystal accents, complemented by a subtle gold pendant necklace. A vintage tan leather handbag rests beside her, while a ceramic vase filled with red berries and dried branches adds a refined decorative touch. Her bare feet are visible, enhancing the relaxed editorial mood. Soft diffused studio lighting, natural skin tones, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, luxury fashion magazine aesthetic, photorealistic, high-end editorial photography, ultra-detailed.
promptZh: 一张优雅的摄影棚时尚人像，一位年轻女性带着温暖、真诚的微笑，舒适地坐在 深蓝色与象牙色调的华丽波斯地毯 上，背景为 质感十足的酒红色幕布。她身着 大地色系的修身橄榄棕短袖针织上衣，搭配剪裁考究的高腰格纹长裤。她的发型是精致的编织盘发，点缀着细腻的珍珠与水晶装饰，并佩戴了一条简约的金色吊坠项链。旁边放着一个复古棕色皮质手袋，一个插满红浆果和干枝的陶瓷花瓶增添了精致的装饰感。她赤着双脚，增强了轻松的编辑摄影氛围。柔和的漫射摄影棚光线，自然的肤色，浅景深，电影级调色，奢华时尚杂志美学，照片级真实感，高端编辑摄影，超高清细节。
